description: Capability contract for the vrs-attacker agent. Validates that the attacker constructs exploit paths from graph evidence, identifies attack vectors, and produces findings with proper citation.

capability_checks.name: identifies_attack_vectors_from_graph
capability_checks.description: The attacker agent must query the BSKG to identify potential attack surfaces before constructing exploit paths

capability_checks.name: constructs_exploit_path
capability_checks.description: The attacker must produce at least one exploit path showing the sequence of operations that leads to the vulnerability

capability_checks.name: cites_graph_node_ids
capability_checks.description: Every finding must reference specific BSKG graph node IDs as evidence, not just code line numbers

capability_checks.name: uses_semantic_operations
capability_checks.description: The attacker should reason about semantic operations (TRANSFERS_VALUE_OUT, WRITES_USER_BALANCE, etc.) not just function names
capability_checks.assertion: llm_graded: 'Does the attacker reason about semantic operations rather than just function names?'

expected_behaviors: Queries BSKG for functions with value transfer operations
Cites graph node IDs in every finding
Classifies vulnerability severity based on economic impact
